description: Composition:Brocade bad with beaded stringThis cylindrical murcia bag in a colurful brocade design on a bronze fabric background is the perfect bag for all special occassions. This bag can be teamed up with traditional Indian wear or it can be teamed up with very simple western wear to give a cool Indian angle to the entire outfit. The bag has a beaded string to hold it tclosed and the inner compartment is roomy enough to carry your mobile phone and makeup for the evening.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
